assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123'
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md line 8 shows the exact JQL: "project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC" — this includes both required labels.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 21-22 under 'Stream Filter' section: "Current issue stream (from summary suffix): rhtpa-2.1" and "TC-8022 summary contains (rhtpa-2.1) — matches current stream". The task summary 'Remediate CVE-2026-55123: bump tokio to 1.42.0 (rhtpa-2.1)' is checked for the stream name.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 26-34 under 'Action 1': "Link TC-8021 to TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type" with the call jira.create_link(inwardIssue: "TC-8021", outwardIssue: "TC-8022", type: "Depend"). Line 29 explicitly states 'standard remediation linkage type'.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 38-49 under 'Action 2': "Remove security-preemptive label from TC-8022. The preemptive task is now linked to a proper CVE Jira, so the security-preemptive label is removed. The task becomes a standard remediation task." Updated labels shown as: "ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123" (without security-preemptive).

assertion_results.text: Step 7 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md line 3: "Step 7 skips remediation task creation for TC-8021 because Step 4.4 already found and reconciled an existing preemptive remediation task for this CVE and stream." Line 14 confirms: "Remediation task already exists for this stream? Yes — TC-8022 covers stream rhtpa-2.1". Line 25: "Creating a new remediation task would be duplicative."
